description: You are a logistics operations analyst at a regional freight distribution company in Bologna, Italy, evaluating the impact of routing 80 additional heavy trucks (gross weight >= 12 tonnes, length >= 10m) through the Acosta corridor during morning peak hours (7:00-9:00 AM). Using the SUMO scenario data at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/, determine if the corridor can accommodate this traffic without average travel time exceeding 300 seconds. Produce a capacity analysis report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/corridor_capacity_report.csv including metrics for avg_travel_time, avg_speed, total_vehicles_completed, avg_waiting_time, and truck_avg_travel_time with columns: metric, baseline_value, with_trucks_value, and delta_pct. Based on your findings, provide a professional recommendation regarding corridor capacity to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/corridor_recommendation.txt.
